common.lastActiveDay: Last active over a day ago
common.noCitiesFound: No cities found — try a different spelling.

family.title: Family Circle
family.watching: Ollia is quietly watching over everyone
family.cityBannerUpgrade: Upgrade to Premium to filter alerts for {{city}}
family.cityBannerNoCity: Upgrade to Premium to see safety alerts for your city
family.cityBannerSet: Set your city to see safety alerts for your area
family.freeLimitBanner: Free plan: 3 members max. Go to Settings to upgrade.
family.footerPremiumNoCity: Showing all regions — set your city to filter by location.
family.footerFree: Showing global alerts — upgrade to Premium to filter by city.
family.footerNote: Official data from USGS, NOAA & GDACS. {{context}} Tap any alert to view the original report.
family.emptyText: Invite family members so they can receive a quiet signal that you're safe.

myStatus.title: My Status
myStatus.subtitle: Your family can see this
myStatus.unlockPatterns: Unlock with Premium to see your activity trends
myStatus.smartAlertsLocked: Get notified when family goes quiet — Premium feature
myStatus.needsAttentionHint: These family members haven't sent a signal recently
myStatus.inviteFromFamily: Invite family members from the Family Circle tab
myStatus.privacyText: Your family only sees your activity status — not your location, app usage, or what you're doing.

settings.title: Settings
settings.cityHint: Used to show you relevant safety alerts
settings.inactivityThresholdHint: Alert you after this many hours of no activity
settings.urgentOvernightHint: Ollia is quiet at night (11pm–8am). Turn this on only if you want nudges to come through even then.
settings.scheduledModeHint: Going on a hike or trip? Set a deadline — your circle gets alerted if you don't check in by then.
settings.safetyPreferencesLocked: Custom inactivity thresholds and scheduled check-ins — Premium feature
settings.activityAppsPrivacy: These apps are never monitored for content — Ollia only detects that you opened them. App names are stored on your device only and never sent to Ollia's servers.
settings.activityAppsLocked: Select apps that count as proof of life — Premium feature
settings.emergencyContactHint: If you're unreachable for an extended period, Ollia will alert this person as a last resort.
settings.name: Name
settings.deleteConfirmMsg: Are you sure? This will permanently delete your account and remove you from all family circles. This cannot be undone.
settings.aboutTagline: A quiet signal that lets your family know you're okay.
settings.signOutConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to sign out?
settings.failedRemoveMember: Failed to remove member. Please try again.
settings.failedDeleteAccount: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
settings.restartRequired: Please restart the app to apply the new layout direction.

upgrade.title: Unlock Premium
upgrade.tagline: Keep your family close, wherever they are.
upgrade.legalNote: Cancel anytime from your account settings. No hidden fees.
upgrade.comingSoonBody: Premium is coming very soon. We'll notify you the moment it's ready.

features.passiveDetection: Passive activity detection — Ollia watches automatically, no action needed
features.smartEscalation: Smart escalation — if you go silent, Ollia notifies your family, then your emergency contact
features.customInactivity: Custom inactivity window — set your own threshold (1–24h)
features.scheduledMode: Scheduled mode — ping your family if you don't check in by a set time
features.activityApps: Activity apps — opening Instagram, WhatsApp, or any app you choose means you're okay
features.travelMode: Travel mode — alert your circle when traveling
features.cityAlerts: City-filtered alerts — only what's near you
features.severityControl: Severity control — filter by low, medium, high
features.activityPatterns: Activity patterns — see your weekly check-in trends

plan.passiveDetection: Passive activity detection — Ollia watches automatically, no action needed
plan.smartEscalation: Smart escalation — if you go silent, Ollia notifies your family, then your emergency contact
plan.customInactivity: Custom inactivity window — set your own threshold (1–24h)
plan.scheduledMode: Scheduled mode — "ping my family if I don't check in by 5pm"
plan.activityApps: Activity apps — opening Instagram, WhatsApp, or any app you choose means you're okay
plan.travelMode: Travel mode — alert your circle when traveling

onboarding.logoTagline: A quiet signal that your family is safe
onboarding.signInSub: Sign in or create an account to keep your family connected.
onboarding.legal: By continuing, you agree to Ollia's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. Your location is never shared without your explicit permission.

invite.title: Invite to circle
invite.smartLinkSub: When they tap it, they'll be brought directly into {{name}}'s circle on Ollia.
invite.namePromptHint: So your invite feels personal, not like a random link.
invite.privacyNote: Only people with this link can join your circle. You can remove them anytime.

join.joinSub: Join their Ollia family circle to share a quiet signal that you're safe — no check-ins needed.
join.privacyNote: Only your activity status is shared. Never your location.
join.successSub:
You've joined {{ownerName}}'s circle.
They'll see a quiet signal whenever you're active.
join.successPrivacy: Only your activity status is shared — never your exact location or what you're doing.
join.errorInvalid: This invite link is no longer valid.
join.errorFull: This circle is full. Ask the owner to upgrade their plan.
join.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

premiumSuccess.title: Welcome to Premium
premiumSuccess.subtitle: Your circle is now unlimited. Here's what just unlocked:
premiumSuccess.footerNote: Manage your subscription anytime in Settings.

premiumCancel.title: No worries
premiumCancel.subtitle: Ollia is still here for you and your family. You can upgrade any time from Settings.

member.privacyNote: Ollia only shows activity signals — never location, messages or personal data.
member.failedRemove: Failed to remove member. Please try again.

checkin.title: Are you okay?
checkin.subtitle:
Your family noticed you haven't been active for a while.
Just let them know you're alright.

usgs.description: Real-time earthquake alerts worldwide. Data published directly by USGS.

noaa.description: Severe weather alerts for the United States including storms, floods, and extreme conditions.

gdacs.description: Worldwide disaster alerts — earthquakes, cyclones, floods, and volcanoes. Covers UAE, Middle East, and all regions not served by NOAA.

sources.disclaimer: Ollia does not modify official alert data. Data is sourced directly from USGS, NOAA, and GDACS (EU Joint Research Centre) and linked to original reports. NOAA covers the US only — enable GDACS for global coverage including UAE and Middle East.

notifications.nudgeBody: A little check-in goes a long way 💛
notifications.nudge2Body: Still thinking of you. One tap is all it takes.
notifications.familySoftBody: {{name}} hasn't checked in today. You may want to reach out.
notifications.familyStrongBody: {{name}} hasn't been heard from in over a day. Please check on them.
notifications.scheduledBody: {{name}} missed their check-in. You may want to reach out.

permissions.notificationsHint: Lets your family know when you haven't been active. Never used for marketing.
permissions.backgroundRefreshHint: Quietly sends a signal while the app is closed so your status stays current.
permissions.backgroundRefreshHintLowPower: Quietly sends a signal while the app is closed so your status stays current. Disabled by iOS when Low Power Mode is on.
permissions.backgroundLocationHint: Used only as a trigger, never stored or shared. Set to Always in iOS Settings for best results.
